headline: Grace McNally
image_alt_text: A social card featuring verified Hush Line user Grace McNally, their bio, their tip line URL, and a QR code that links to the same URL.

social.bluesky:
🤩 Verified Member Highlight!

Documentary director Grace McNally is behind "Keep Sweet: Pray and Obey" and "Slay the Dragon.".

Send Grace a tip: https://tips.hushline.app/to/gracermcnally
